questions.question: Why does the generator produce a ranked queue instead of a single hypothesis?
options: Because the parser cannot read a single block
Because the runner needs depth so it can pop the next hypothesis when the first one fails
Because the mock model only emits lists
Because the embedding requires more than one input
questions.explanation: The point of generating a queue is to amortise sampling cost across the loop. When the first hypothesis fails the runner pops the next without a fresh sampling pass.
questions.question_zh: 为什么 generator 产出一个排好序的队列,而不是单个假设?
options_zh: 因为 parser 读不了单一块
因为 runner 需要纵深: 当第一个假设失败时可以弹出下一个
因为 mock 模型只能输出列表
因为 embedding 需要超过一个输入
questions.explanation_zh: 生成队列的意义在于把采样成本摊给整个循环。第一个假设失败时,runner 弹出下一个,无需再做一次采样。

questions.question: What does the temperature ramp accomplish on each pass?
options: It raises the parser tolerance
It widens the sampling distribution so later drafts can land further from the seed
It increases the embedding dimension
It triples the seed value
questions.explanation: Higher temperature widens the sampling distribution. The ramp encourages each pass to drift further so the novelty filter has something to do.
questions.question_zh: 每一遍的 temperature 渐升起到什么作用?
options_zh: 提高 parser 容忍度
拓宽采样分布,让后续草稿能离 seed 更远
增加 embedding 维度
把 seed 值乘三
questions.explanation_zh: 更高的 temperature 拓宽采样分布。渐升让每一遍倾向于漂得更远,novelty 过滤器才有事可做。

questions.question: When does the novelty filter reject a draft?
options: When its rank score is below the threshold
When its minimum cosine distance to any prior survivor falls below the novelty threshold
When its parser passes but its tag count is wrong
When its draft pass is greater than the queue length
questions.explanation: Novelty is the minimum distance to prior survivors. If that distance is below the threshold the draft is a near duplicate and is dropped.
questions.question_zh: novelty 过滤器在什么时候拒绝草稿?
options_zh: 当 rank 分低于阈值时
当它与所有先前幸存者的最小 cosine 距离低于 novelty 阈值时
当它通过 parser 但 tag 数不对时
当它的 draft pass 大于队列长度时
questions.explanation_zh: Novelty 是与先前幸存者的最小距离。低于阈值意味着近似重复,被丢弃。

questions.question: Which three components combine in the rank score?
options: Latency, throughput, cost
Novelty, specificity, testability
Temperature, seed, pass index
Variables, metric, baseline length
questions.explanation: The rank score is a weighted sum of novelty, specificity, and testability. Each sub score lives between zero and one.
questions.question_zh: rank 分由哪三部分组合?
options_zh: 延迟、吞吐、成本
Novelty、specificity、testability
Temperature、seed、pass index
Variables、metric、baseline 长度
questions.explanation_zh: Rank 分是 novelty、specificity 和 testability 的加权和; 每个子分数都在 0 到 1 之间。

questions.question: Why is the mock language model keyed on a temperature bucket rather than the raw float?
options: Because floats cannot be hashed
Because buckets make the schedule discrete so a small temperature change can pick a different scripted draft
Because the parser needs an integer
Because the embedding requires it
questions.explanation: Buckets discretise the continuous schedule. Two adjacent temperatures can map to different buckets and pull different drafts from the scripted bank, which is how the mock simulates varied sampling.
questions.question_zh: 为什么 mock 语言模型按 temperature 桶而不是原始 float 来索引?
options_zh: float 不可哈希
桶把渐升离散化,微小的 temperature 改变也能选出不同的脚本草稿
parser 需要 integer
embedding 要求
questions.explanation_zh: 桶把连续的渐升离散化。两个相邻 temperature 可能落入不同桶,从脚本库中拉出不同草稿,这就是 mock 模拟多样采样的方式。

questions.question: What happens if every draft from the mock model fails the parser?
options: The generator raises a hard error
The queue is empty and each pass logs a parse rejection so the failure mode is auditable
The runner retries with a fresh prompt
The novelty threshold is lowered automatically
questions.explanation: Parser failures are recorded as logs with a parse reject reason. The queue can come back empty without crashing the loop, and the logs explain why.
questions.question_zh: 如果 mock 模型的每条草稿都被 parser 拒绝,会发生什么?
options_zh: generator 抛出硬错误
队列为空,且每一遍都记录 parse 拒绝日志,失败模式可审计
runner 用新 prompt 重试
novelty 阈值被自动降低
questions.explanation_zh: Parser 失败被记录为带 parse reject 原因的日志。队列可以为空但循环不会崩溃,日志解释为什么。
